init.title: Yarbo Options
init.description: Select which Yarbo devices to monitor and how Home Assistant keeps them awake.

data_description.keep_awake_mode: Always: HA renews the wake-up every 4 minutes so the device never sleeps. Only while charging: wake-up is renewed only while the device is charging on the dock. Never: HA never wakes the device automatically; data updates only while the device is awake on its own.

error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found for this account.
error.fetch_devices_failed: Failed to fetch device list. Please try again.
